it:77.2: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
it:77.3: "This body falls apart; consciousness is subject to fading; all acquisitions are inconstant, suffering, subject to change."
it:77.4: Knowing the body as falling apart, and consciousness as dissolving away, seeing the danger in acquisitions, you've gone beyond birth and death. Having reached the foremost peace, you bide your time, composed.
it:77.5: This, too, was the meaning of what was said by the Blessed One, so I have heard.
